---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem would this feature solve? Describe the use case clearly.

## Proposed Solution

What should the feature do? How would it work?

## Alternative Solutions

What alternatives have you considered?

## Implementation Notes

Any thoughts on how this could be implemented (modules to modify, API integrations, etc.)?

## Additional Context

- Relevant commands, APIs, or data sources
- Examples from other projects
- Screenshots or mockups
